response: *highlighted section* The rectangle has side lengths in the ratio of $2:5$, so if the sides are $2x$ and $5x$, the total perimeter is $2(2x + 5x) = 14x$. *highlighted section* When all sides are extended by $9$ cm, the new side lengths become $2x + 9$ and $5x + 9$. *highlighted section* The new perimeter is $2(2x + 9 + 5x + 9) = 2(7x + 18) = 14x + 36$. *highlighted section* The ratio of the new side lengths is $(2x + 9) : (5x + 9)$. *highlighted section* The ratio of the side lengths of the rectangle that results from extending all of its sides by an additional $9$ cm is $3:7$. *highlighted section* The keyword target is included once in the response. *highlighted section* The keyword vacation is included twice in the response. *highlighted section* The specialist is the one who ensures the calculations are correct.
